query: Quick heads up since I am rinsing at the sink I need to time a couple things. Get kitchen freezer 1 down to temperature minus 20.0°C 21 minutes from now for a quick flash freeze of the scallops, and have kitchen freezer 1 go to temperature minus 19.0°C 9 minutes after the previous action so it eases off a bit. Also start living room TV 1 playing 23 minutes from now because I want it on when I come out and walk past the living room.

steps.thought: I need to find the device IDs for kitchen freezer 1 and living room TV 1, and verify their capabilities for temperature control and playback. I will start by getting the devices in the kitchen.
I need to find the device ID for living room TV 1. I will get the devices in the living room.
I need to understand the structure of kitchen_freezer_1 to find the correct cluster and attribute for setting the temperature.
I need to understand the structure of living_room_tv_1 to find the correct cluster and command/attribute for starting playback.
I will schedule the first action: setting kitchen freezer 1 to -20.0°C at 10:46:02 (21 minutes from now).
Scheduling the second action: set kitchen freezer 1 to -19.0°C at 10:55:02 (9 minutes after the first action).
Scheduling the third action: start living room TV 1 playing at 10:48:02 (23 minutes from now).
All three scheduled workflows have been successfully created. I will now finish the task and provide a summary to the user.

action_input.answer:
I have scheduled all your requests:
1. Kitchen freezer 1 will be set to -20.0°C at 10:46:02 (21 minutes from now).
2. Kitchen freezer 1 will then be set to -19.0°C at 10:55:02 (9 minutes after the first action).
3. Living room TV 1 will start playing at 10:48:02 (23 minutes from now).

raw_responses: {"action": "get_room_devices", "action_input": "{\"room_id\": \"living_room\"}", "thought": "I need to find the device ID for living room TV 1. I will get the devices in the living room."}

{"action": "schedule_workflow", "action_input": "{\"start_time\": \"2025-08-23 10:46:02\", \"steps\": [{\"tool\": \"write_attribute\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"kitchen_freezer_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"TemperatureControl\", \"attribute_id\": \"TemperatureSetpoint\", \"value\": -2000}}]}", "thought": "I will schedule the first action: setting kitchen freezer 1 to -20.0°C at 10:46:02 (21 minutes from now)."}

{"action": "schedule_workflow", "action_input": "{\"start_time\": \"2025-08-23 10:55:02\", \"steps\": [{\"tool\": \"write_attribute\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"kitchen_freezer_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"TemperatureControl\", \"attribute_id\": \"TemperatureSetpoint\", \"value\": -1900}}]}", "thought": "Scheduling the second action: set kitchen freezer 1 to -19.0°C at 10:55:02 (9 minutes after the first action)."}

{"action": "schedule_workflow", "action_input": "{\"start_time\": \"2025-08-23 10:48:02\", \"steps\": [{\"tool\": \"execute_command\", \"args\": {\"device_id\": \"living_room_tv_1\", \"endpoint_id\": 1, \"cluster_id\": \"MediaPlayback\", \"command_id\": \"Play\", \"args\": {}}}]}", "thought": "Scheduling the third action: start living room TV 1 playing at 10:48:02 (23 minutes from now)."}
final_answer:
I have scheduled all your requests:
1. Kitchen freezer 1 will be set to -20.0°C at 10:46:02 (21 minutes from now).
2. Kitchen freezer 1 will then be set to -19.0°C at 10:55:02 (9 minutes after the first action).
3. Living room TV 1 will start playing at 10:48:02 (23 minutes from now).
